书中世界是我向往所在","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N93cU9zQ/BtJPzSGAz1XBns=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1e8aa153df9641b7b53edf656609cf73~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616810&x-signature=w0Fn1WKzII4U1uq91CQL6LUlOpo%3D","user_id":"56803309389160","user_name":"只看后宫。。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"56803309389160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776750617,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7081843250624990240","book_info":{"abstract":"【贱萌反派＋茶艺＋男万人迷＋高颜值＋腹黑＋老六＋白切黑＋搞笑诙谐＋＋无固定cp】
本书又名，“我扮演绿茶男，被男女主宠上天！”
苏卿穿越到了都市爽文世界中。
成了第一章绑架女主，第二章被男主暴揍，第三章领了牢饭的反派富二代。
好在他觉醒了‘贴心大反派系统’，只要打击主角掠夺主角机缘，改变小说剧情就能获得系统奖励，并且全部剧情走完后，可全数带回现实世界。
颜值逆天，双商在线，熟知剧情的他，准备从根源开始改变剧情。
可...
手下：少爷，林希儿已经给您绑回来了。
苏卿：.....
苏卿：把我绑起来，并在全城散播我被绑架了的消息！
——
林希儿：啊啊啊，我这是在哪？救命啊！
苏卿：啊啊啊，救命啊，姐姐救我！
